Localization.Description: Attempt to log in to the system

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user from host {src.ip} logged in via the web interface on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to log in on host {event_src.host}
A user from host {src.host} failed to log in via the web interface on host {event_src.host}
A user from host {src.ip} logged in on host {event_src.host}
